# Quotee

> Official website: https://quotee.aashuu.tech/

Quotee is a free online quote maker and quote creator. It helps people create beautiful quote images, quote snapshots, and social-ready quote posts with customizable themes, fonts, alignment, and export options.

## Product
- Name: Quotee
- URL: https://quotee.aashuu.tech/
- Category: Quote maker / quote creation web app
- Pricing: Free

## Core capabilities
- Create quote images from custom text
- Choose visual themes and backgrounds
- Customize typography and alignment
- Export quote cards for social media sharing

## Creator
- Name: aashuu
- Website: https://www.aashuu.tech/
- X: https://x.com/warrioraashuu
